decisions.description: Evaluates which household name state applies after a member ACR is deleted. Priority: (1) a primary member still exists → Has_Primary_Member → Get_Primary_Contact; (2) any members remain but none is primary → Has_Members_No_Primary → Get_Last_Updated_Contact; (3) default → Empty Household. Contact lookup elements fetch the name before the Account update.
decisions.name: Determine_Household_Name_State
decisions.label: Determine Household Name State

Flow.description: Before Delete trigger on AccountContactRelation. Companion to SMQS_Household_Setup_Name_Sync_AccountContactRelationship_to_Account which handles create and update. When a household ACR is deleted, re-evaluates the parent Account name using the same 3-state logic. ACR queries exclude the record being deleted (Id != $Record.Id) because Before Delete fires while the record is still in the database. Contact name fields are fetched in a separate Get Records step per branch — cross-object field traversal is not supported in queriedFields with outputReference mode. Entry filter: parent Account Is_Household__c = true. ISCHANGED() and ISNEW() are not valid on delete triggers — entry filter uses only the household checkbox.

formulas.description: Produces "[First] [Last]'s Household" from the most recently updated member remaining after the delete. Used when Has_Members_No_Primary branch is taken and var_LastUpdatedContact is populated.
formulas.name: f_LastUpdatedHouseholdName

formulas.description: Produces "[First] [Last]'s Household" from the remaining primary member. Used when Has_Primary_Member branch is taken and var_PrimaryContact is populated.
formulas.name: f_PrimaryHouseholdName

Flow.interviewLabel: SMQS Household Setup Name Sync ACR Delete to Account {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: SMQS Household Setup Name Sync ACR Delete to Account

recordLookups.description: Fetches FirstName and LastName from the Contact record for the most recently updated remaining household member, using var_LastUpdatedACR.ContactId. Connector routes to Set_Name_Last_Updated_Household.
recordLookups.name: Get_Last_Updated_Contact
recordLookups.label: Get Last Updated Contact

recordLookups.description: Queries the most recently updated ACR with Is_Household_Member__c = true for the parent Account after the delete, sorted LastModifiedDate DESC. Excludes the record being deleted (Id != $Record.Id) because Before Delete fires while the record is still in the DB. Returns null when no members remain. Result stored in var_LastUpdatedACR (Id and ContactId only). Connector routes to Determine_Household_Name_State.
recordLookups.name: Get_Last_Updated_Member_ACR
recordLookups.label: Get Last Updated Member ACR

recordLookups.description: Fetches FirstName and LastName from the Contact record for the remaining primary household member, using var_PrimaryACR.ContactId. Connector routes to Set_Name_Primary_Household.
recordLookups.name: Get_Primary_Contact
recordLookups.label: Get Primary Contact

recordLookups.description: Queries the single ACR with IsPrimaryMember = true and Is_Household_Member__c = true for the parent Account after the delete. Excludes the record being deleted (Id != $Record.Id) because Before Delete fires while the record is still in the DB. Returns null when no primary exists. Result stored in var_PrimaryACR (Id and ContactId only). Connector routes to Get_Last_Updated_Member_ACR.
recordLookups.name: Get_Primary_Member_ACR
recordLookups.label: Get Primary Member ACR

recordUpdates.description: Sets Account Name to "Empty Household" when no ACRs with Is_Household_Member__c = true remain after the delete. Reached via Determine_Household_Name_State default branch. Terminal — no successor element.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Name_Empty_Household
recordUpdates.label: Set Name - Empty Household

recordUpdates.description: Sets Account Name to f_LastUpdatedHouseholdName ("[First Last]'s Household") from the most recently updated remaining member. Reached via Has_Members_No_Primary branch, after Get_Last_Updated_Contact fetches the name. Terminal — no successor element.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Name_Last_Updated_Household
recordUpdates.label: Set Name - Last Updated Member's Household

recordUpdates.description: Sets Account Name to f_PrimaryHouseholdName ("[First Last]'s Household") from the remaining primary member. Reached via Has_Primary_Member branch, after Get_Primary_Contact fetches the name. Terminal — no successor element.
recordUpdates.name: Set_Name_Primary_Household
recordUpdates.label: Set Name - Primary's Household

variables.description: Output variable for Get_Last_Updated_Member_ACR. Holds the most recently updated ACR with Is_Household_Member__c = true remaining after the delete, or null if no members remain. ContactId is used by Get_Last_Updated_Contact to retrieve the name.
variables.name: var_LastUpdatedACR

variables.description: Output variable for Get_Last_Updated_Contact. Holds FirstName and LastName for the most recently updated remaining household member. Consumed by f_LastUpdatedHouseholdName.
variables.name: var_LastUpdatedContact

variables.description: Output variable for Get_Primary_Member_ACR. Holds the ACR where IsPrimaryMember = true remaining after the delete, or null if none exists. ContactId is used by Get_Primary_Contact to retrieve the name.
variables.name: var_PrimaryACR

variables.description: Output variable for Get_Primary_Contact. Holds FirstName and LastName for the remaining primary household member. Consumed by f_PrimaryHouseholdName.
variables.name: var_PrimaryContact
